entries.source: "Explain this grammar correction"
entries.value: "Jelaskan ini grammar correction"

entries.source: "I picked B. Why is C right?"
entries.value: "Saya memilih B. Mengapa C betul?"

entries.source: "Why is my algebra answer wrong?"
entries.value: "Mengapa jawapan algebra saya salah?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Explain My Answer on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Panduan praktikal untuk menggunakan Jelaskan Jawapan Saya di inspir bagi pembelajaran practice, dengan prompt, gelung belajar, dan tabiat AI yang lebih selamat.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A lebih kuat gelung belajar

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Adapt session untuk anda goal.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tutor AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step berbanding akhir jawapan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Minta AI menyemak penaakulan anda, bukan hanya hasilnya.

entries.source: Explain My Answer
entries.value: Terangkan Jawapan Saya

entries.source: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Jelaskan Jawapan Saya ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Paste soalan, jawapan anda, dan expected jawapan jika anda mempunyai ia. Anda buddy explains penaakulan dan membantu anda avoid same mistake seterusnya time.

entries.source: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Jelaskan Jawapan Saya: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish oleh writing idea back daripada memory.

entries.source: Learners exploring practice topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Pelajar yang meneroka topik latihan yang mahukan panduan praktikal dan bukannya kotak jawapan generik.

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Latih tubi

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompt untuk dicuba

entries.source: Start the live mode at Explain My Answer. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Homework Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Mulakan mod langsung di Jelaskan Jawapan Saya. Jika anda mahukan format pembelajaran berdekatan, cuba Pembimbing Kerja Rumah. Untuk pandangan platform yang lebih luas, baca perkara yang patut dilakukan oleh rakan pembelajaran AI untuk semua orang.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Mula dengan contoh prompt.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell mod apa anda ialah trying untuk belajar atau produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Itu difference shows up dalam flow. Bukannya one giant response, terbaik sessions move melalui loop: set goal, try something, get feedback, baiki lemah spot, dan pilih seterusnya action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Fokus itu penting. Chatbot umum boleh menjawab hampir apa sahaja, tetapi mod pembelajaran memberi bentuk kepada perbualan. Ia mengarah anda kepada jenis pemikiran, latihan, maklum balas, atau penerokaan yang membantu idea melekat.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ini ialah same habit behind belajar dengan AI tanpa cheating yourself: keep pelajar active. AI ialah most berguna apabila ia gives anda feedback di anda pemikiran.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Mod ini amat berguna untuk pelajar yang mahu:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for explain my answer with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Mod ini ditala untuk menerangkan jawapan saya dengan gesaan, contoh dan aliran pembelajaran tersendiri.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try step dalam anda own words.

entries.source: Understand why an answer works.
entries.value: Fahami mengapa jawapan works.

entries.source: Use Explain My Answer when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gunakan Jelaskan Jawapan Saya apabila anda mahukan sesi yang bermula cepat tetapi masih menyesuaikan diri dengan anda. Matlamat pertama bukan untuk kedengaran hebat. Matlamat pertama ialah menjadikan langkah seterusnya terasa mampu dilakukan.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Perkara yang dibantu oleh mod ini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ke mana seterusnya

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Anda juga boleh bermula dengan versi kasar masalah sebenar anda. Prompt pertama yang bersepah tidak mengapa. Sesi boleh menjelaskan tahap, khalayak, tarikh akhir, dan gaya selepas anda bermula.
